title: Savory Juicy Lazy-Sunday Rice Krispies Stir-fry
description: A savory and juicy croatian dish featuring rice krispies in a paleo-friendly stir-fry that's perfect for lazy Sunday mornings.

ingredients.name: Herbs (Optional)
ingredients.notes: Such as parsley or cilantro for garnish

instructions: In a small saucepan, combine Rice Krispies with Palm Sugar and water. Stir until the mixture starts to dissolve.
Add Avocado Oil to the saucepan over medium heat. Once hot, add Garlic cloves and cook until they become fragrant (about 1 minute).
If using chili flakes, sprinkle them into the pan and stir well for a few seconds. If not, continue with next step.
Pour in the Krispies mixture from step 2 and mix well to combine Rice Krispies with the oil and spices.
Let it simmer for about 1-2 minutes or until the mixture is fully coated and starting to thicken slightly.
Remove from heat. Let cool slightly before serving if desired, then garnish with herbs for presentation.
